SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Misc

Class AppTheme

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Misc.AppTheme
public final class AppTheme extends Object
Stores the editable host theme colours and derives the rest of the UI palette from them.

Only the core colour slots are persisted. The other colours are generated so the interface stays visually consistent when a user changes a theme.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Creates a deep copy of an existing theme.
    AppTheme(String name, String appBackground, String surface, String accent, String mutedText, String displayFrame, String sectionHighlight)
    Creates a theme from its editable core colour slots.

  • Constructor Details

    • AppTheme

      public AppTheme(String name, String appBackground, String surface, String accent, String mutedText, String displayFrame, String sectionHighlight)
      Creates a theme from its editable core colour slots.
      Parameters:
      name - theme name shown in the UI
      appBackground - window background colour
      surface - panel and card background colour
      accent - main emphasis colour
      mutedText - subdued text colour
      displayFrame - display surround colour
      sectionHighlight - section tint colour

    • AppTheme

      public AppTheme(AppTheme other)
      Creates a deep copy of an existing theme.
      Parameters:
      other - theme to copy

  • Method Details

    • Name

      public String Name()
      Returns the display name for the theme.
      Returns:
      theme name

    • Copy

      public AppTheme Copy()
      Returns a deep copy of this theme.
      Returns:
      copied theme

    • Renamed

      public AppTheme Renamed(String name)
      Returns a copy of this theme with a different display name.
      Parameters:
      name - replacement theme name
      Returns:
      renamed theme copy

    • CoreColour

      public Color CoreColour(AppThemeColorRole role)
      Returns the stored colour for a core theme slot.
      Parameters:
      role - theme slot to read
      Returns:
      colour assigned to the slot

    • CoreHex

      public String CoreHex(AppThemeColorRole role)
      Returns a core colour as an uppercase hexadecimal string.
      Parameters:
      role - theme slot to read
      Returns:
      colour in #RRGGBB form

    • SetCoreColour

      public void SetCoreColour(AppThemeColorRole role, String hex)
      Replaces a persisted theme slot.
      Parameters:
      role - theme slot to update
      hex - colour in hexadecimal form
